title: Gold / Black — AI Update
prompt:
Instagram carousel cover slide, portrait 4:5 composition. Premium founder-media design for Thai business owners. Render as a finished premium carousel post, not a mockup. High-end editorial art direction, mobile-first hierarchy, beautiful spacing, clean readable typography if rendering text. Footer handle: @jeditrinupab. Avoid childish icons, clutter, cheap startup template look, neon overload, malformed UI.
Style family: Gold / Black. Pure black luxury background with warm gold glow, premium 3D symbolic AI-system object, elegant gold linework, high contrast. Thai AI business education aesthetic.
Exact text intention:
Eyebrow: AI UPDATE
Main headline: AI ไม่ได้เก่งขึ้นเฉยๆ แต่มันเริ่มทำงานแทนทีม
Support: เริ่มวัดผล AI เป็นเวลา ต้นทุน และ workflow ที่ทำซ้ำได้
Footer: @jeditrinupab
Composition: strong gold visual object top/right, big Thai headline lower-left, clean footer.
